classes.name: DemoListLinePlot
classes.doc: Stateless: render full ``time``/``value`` trajectories as one line.

classes.name: DemoMultiTimeSeriesPlot
classes.doc: Accumulate a ``list[float]`` per step; render one line per element.

classes.name: DemoTimeSeriesPlot
classes.doc: Accumulate a scalar ``value`` per step; render value-vs-step line plot.

classes.name: Distribution
classes.doc: Histogram of an observable's distribution.

classes.name: GG1993Annealing
classes.doc: Annealing: bulk ⟨n⟩ settles to ~6 within a couple of MCS

classes.name: GG1993CellSorting
classes.doc: Cell sorting: total boundary energy decreases as the aggregate relaxes

classes.name: GG1993Checkerboard
classes.doc: Negative γ_ld drives mixing: heterotypic (l–d) contact dominates

classes.name: GG1993DispersalNoSeparate
classes.doc: No separation: clusters stay attached despite strong tension

classes.name: GG1993DispersalSeparate
classes.doc: Full separation: light and dark clusters split apart

classes.name: GG1993DispersalSloughing
classes.doc: Sloughing: light cells disperse into the medium as l–M contact surges

classes.name: GG1993Engulfment
classes.doc: Engulfment: dark cells bury while light forms the outer layer

classes.name: GG1993GlobalEquilibration
classes.doc: Global equilibration: topological moments stabilise by ~400 MCS

classes.name: GG1993PartialSorting
classes.doc: Partial sorting: heterotypic contact plateaus — sorting stalls

classes.name: GG1993PositionReversal
classes.doc: Position reversal: dark–medium contact overtakes light–medium

classes.name: GG1993VacancyCavity
classes.doc: Cavity: dark cells aggregate (d–d↑) around a light-lined medium pocket

classes.name: Heatmap
classes.doc: Color matrix over a 2D parameter sweep.

classes.name: ParamVsObservable
classes.doc: Plot reduced observable values across a sweep.

classes.name: PhaseSpace
classes.doc: XY trajectory of two observables.

classes.name: SpeciesTimeSeriesPlots
classes.doc: Time-series HTML plot of TelluriumProcess's species concentrations.

classes.name: TimeSeriesFromObservables
classes.doc: Multi-observable time series, self-contained.

classes.name: TimeSeriesPlot
classes.doc: Plot one or more observables vs time.
